final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: architectural visualization / interior design rendering, wide horizontal crop
Primary request: photorealistic render of a modern living room blending Nordic minimalism and Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetics
Scene/backdrop: spacious indoor living room with floor-to-ceiling windows, soft natural daylight flooding in, blurred green foliage visible outside
Subject: low-profile linen off-white fabric sofa with assorted textured throw pillows; irregular-edge natural stone coffee table with raw organic silhouette; tall fiddle-leaf fig (琴叶榕) in a corner planter; slender arc floor lamp with thin stem; open shelf with a curated selection of books and ceramic objects following danshari (断舍離) principles
Style/medium: architectural visualization, photorealistic 3D render, soft natural lighting
Composition/framing: eye-level wide shot, slight receding perspective, balanced symmetry with breathing negative space
Lighting/mood: abundant diffused natural light from large floor-to-ceiling windows, no harsh shadows, calm and contemplative Zen atmosphere, quiet and restrained
Color palette: white, light grey, warm off-white linen, pale white-oak wood tones, muted earth ceramics, soft green foliage accents
Materials/textures: matte white wall paint, light white-oak solid hardwood flooring with visible grain, raw natural stone with unfinished edges, woven linen fabric, unglazed ceramic surfaces
Constraints: maintain minimalist spatial composition with generous empty space; no clutter; no decorative excess; preserve wabi-sabi imperfection in stone and ceramics
Avoid: overly staged styling, artificial-looking renders, harsh directional shadows, saturated colors, busy patterns
